name: Number 104: Masquerade
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>１０４ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>仮面魔踏士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マスカレード・マジシャン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>シャイニング
desc:
3 Level 4 monsters
During the Battle Phase, when your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the activation, and if you do, inflict 800 damage to your opponent. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can send the top card of your opponent's Deck to the GY.
mnst_eff:
3 Level 4 monsters
During the Battle Phase, when your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the activation, and if you do, inflict 800 damage to your opponent. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can send the top card of your opponent's Deck to the GY.
eff:
3 Level 4 monsters
During the Battle Phase, when your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the activation, and if you do, inflict 800 damage to your opponent. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can send the top card of your opponent's Deck to the GY.

action: Sends from the top of your opponent's Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
